name: Child saved by herbs and heat

props.ChoiceTitle: Child saved by herbs and heat
props.ChoiceText: When the child's skin burned and the mother had nearly begun mourning, your decoctions, compresses, and stubbornness pulled them back.
props.ChoiceBio: Saving a child with herbs and heat made your name travel further than any lecture could have.

0.TransitionText: Because saving a child with herbs and heat made your name travel further than any lecture could have, you stayed with bodies, remedies, and the uneasy authority of healing.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Physician, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: A family whose child you once pulled back from the brink.
1.TransitionText: Because saving a child with herbs and heat made your name travel further than any lecture could have, suffering pushed you toward faith and consolation.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because saving a child with herbs and heat made your name travel further than any lecture could have, you were drawn into half-hidden remedies and village mysteries.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cunning Folk, but you may remain on your current path instead.
